Unnamed: 1: Synthetic teaching dataset for plotting with pandas/matplotlib/seaborn.
Histogram of rt_ms; boxplot of RT by condition/group; scatter age vs mean_rt_ms; line plot ERP waveform by condition; barplot/heatmap of ROI beta weights.
This dataset is simulated for teaching. It is not real participant data.
One row per participant with demographics and questionnaire variables.
One row per behavioral trial with RT, accuracy, pupil, and EEG-style summary measures.
Participant-level averages useful for quick scatterplots and grouped comparisons.
Long-format ERP waveform table across time points for each subject and condition.
Long-format ROI beta weights for simple neuroimaging-style plots.
